info.title: Semrush API
info.description: Verified Semrush API specification covering SEO Analytics, Trends, Projects, and Site Audit endpoints. All response schemas verified via live API calls on 2026-03-17.

servers.description: SEO Analytics API (domain, keyword, overview reports)

apiKey.name: key
apiKey.description: Semrush API key passed as query parameter 'key'
